The 90-Day Question

Did the results hold?
And did they compound?

Forty-five days into our engagement with ADORA Private Security, we documented something remarkable: a brand-new company, with no domain history and no review base, was being named in Google AI Overviews alongside competitors who had been operating in Conroe for over a decade. We published those results in March. The honest question every business owner asks at that point is the same one we asked ourselves — will this last, or will Google's algorithm shift and erase the gains?

This document answers that question. Every search shown in these screenshots was performed in late April 2026 — exactly 90 days after engagement began. The queries are the same six we documented at 45 days, plus several we didn't yet appear for. The platforms now include not only Google Search, but ChatGPT, Google Gemini, and Perplexity AI — the four major surfaces where buying decisions are increasingly being shaped.

Short version: every 45-day result held. Every one. And the visibility expanded into surfaces and platforms that weren't even on the table before.

The Side-by-Side

What was true at 45 days.
What is true at 90.

At 45 days, ADORA's visibility was concentrated on Google. At 90 days, it has propagated across the AI ecosystem. Below is the same set of queries, viewed twice — once at the 45-day mark, and once at 90.

45-Day Baseline · March 2026

Google-only visibility, established.

  • AI Overview: VIP security in Conroe Texas
  • AI Overview: Construction security guards in Conroe Texas
  • #1 Organic: Security guards in Conroe Texas
  • Top of Page 1: Security guards company in Conroe Texas
  • Page 1 (#4): Private security company in Conroe Texas
  • Page 1: Conroe security companies
  • Knowledge Panel earned
90-Day Audit · May 2026

Held — and expanded across the AI ecosystem.

  • All six 45-day Google results held — none lost
  • NEW Google AI Overview: Private security companies in Conroe Texas
  • NEW: ChatGPT now lists ADORA first for three local queries
  • NEW: Google Gemini lists ADORA first with full entity data
  • NEW: Perplexity AI cites ADORA by domain name
  • NEW: Dedicated entity card — Construction Site Security Expert in ADORA
  • Knowledge Panel still active and prominent
The Pattern

This is what an AI-native foundation produces. A site built for how Google, ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity actually understand businesses — not for the SEO playbook that worked in 2022 — doesn't just rank. It propagates. The same signals that earned ADORA a Google AI Overview at 45 days were read by ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity over the following weeks and incorporated into their own answers.

Proof · Google Search

The flagship rankings.
Held at 90 days.

Of the six queries we documented at 45 days, every single one is still producing the same — or stronger — result at 90 days. Below are three of the most consequential: the #1 organic flagship, the AI Overview for VIP security, and the AI Overview for construction security, which has now generated a dedicated entity card in the right rail.

Google Search "security guards in conroe texas" #1 Organic Result · Held from 45-day baseline
The flagship result. ADORA holds the #1 organic position above Twin City Security, Yelp's Top 10 listing, International Guard Services, and Ranger Guard — companies that have been competing for this query for years.
Google Search · AI Overview "VIP security in conroe texas" Named in AI Overview + Knowledge Panel · Held from 45-day baseline
ADORA is named directly inside Google's AI-generated answer, alongside Ranger Guard and MP Security — both in business over a decade. ADORA's Knowledge Panel listing also appears in the right rail.
Google Search · AI Overview + Entity Card "construction security guards in conroe texas" AI Overview cite + new dedicated entity card · Expansion since 45-day
In addition to the AI Overview citation, Google has now generated a dedicated right-rail entity card titled "Construction Site Security Expert in ADORA" — a clear signal that Google's knowledge graph is treating ADORA as a recognized authority in this niche.
New Coverage · Google

A query they didn't appear for at 45 days.
Now they're at the top.

"Private security companies in Conroe Texas" did not produce an AI Overview citation for ADORA at 45 days. At 90 days, not only does an AI Overview now appear for this query — ADORA is named first, with their phone number embedded directly in the answer. This is the kind of coverage expansion that the Authority Engine framework is built to produce over time.

Google Search · NEW AI Overview "private security companies in conroe texas" Named first in AI Overview with phone number · NEW since 45-day audit
ADORA is the first company named in the AI Overview — ahead of MP Security and Ranger Guard — with their direct phone number (936-207-1033) embedded in the answer. The structured "Top Private Security Companies in Conroe, TX" list also leads with ADORA.
Cross-Platform Expansion

It's not just Google anymore.
ChatGPT. Gemini. Perplexity.

Buying decisions are increasingly happening on AI assistants other than Google. A prospect in Conroe might ask ChatGPT for a private security recommendation. Another might use Google Gemini. A third might use Perplexity AI. For ADORA to be cited across every one of these platforms — by name, with accurate details, often listed first — is what compounding visibility actually looks like. None of this required new work between 45 and 90 days. It is the inevitable downstream effect of a properly built AI-native foundation.

ChatGPT "construction security in conroe texas" ADORA listed first · NEW platform coverage
ChatGPT places ADORA at the top of "Top Construction Security Options in Conroe," ahead of MP Security. Note how ChatGPT cites the ADORA brand directly and pulls structured detail — "specializes in construction site security, patrols, and surveillance · strong on local knowledge + fast response."
Google Gemini "private security companies in conroe texas" ADORA listed first with full entity data · NEW platform coverage
Gemini delivers the most authoritative result of any AI platform. ADORA is named first with full entity verification — address (412 W Phillips St #102, Conroe, TX 77301), phone (936-207-1033), and active Texas security license (#B26205201). This is Gemini treating ADORA as a verified, indexed business entity.
Perplexity AI "security guards in conroe texas" ADORA cited by domain · NEW platform coverage
Perplexity includes ADORA in its sourced answer for security guards in Conroe, citing the privatesecurityconroe domain directly. Perplexity is heavily used by researchers, journalists, and B2B buyers — exactly the demographic ADORA wants in front of for high-value contracts.

Forty-five days got ADORA into Google's AI Overviews. Ninety days has them cited by name across every major AI platform a Conroe buyer might use. That is not a ranking. That is authority — and it is what the framework was designed to produce.

— Avenity Business Solutions · 90-Day Audit Note

The Numbers

13 documented results across 4 major AI and search platforms. Six holds at 90 days. One expanded result (now with a dedicated entity card). Six new results that didn't exist at 45 days — including a brand-new Google AI Overview, three ChatGPT placements, two Gemini placements, and one Perplexity citation. Every single result is verifiable in real time by performing the same search yourself.

Why This Compounds

The same three pillars.
Now compounding across platforms.

The framework that got ADORA named in Google's AI Overview at 45 days is the same framework that has now propagated their visibility across ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity at 90. The mechanism is the same. The signals are the same. The reason it works on every platform is that every modern AI assistant is reading the same kinds of structured signals — and we built the foundation to be readable by all of them from day one.

Pillar 01

Clarity

A site that tells every AI exactly who ADORA serves, what they do, and where they operate — in language no model has to guess at. Once one model picks up the signal, the others follow.

Pillar 02

Authority

Google Knowledge Panel, verified license number, structured business data, and consistent NAP signals. This is what made Gemini comfortable presenting ADORA's address, phone, and license number directly in its answer.

Pillar 03

Structure

Service-specific pages, location-specific content, and schema-marked entity definitions — the foundation that allows AI Overviews to cite specific niches like "construction security" rather than just generic queries.

What's Next

From dominance to defensibility.

The first 90 days proved the foundation works. The next 90 are about reinforcing the moat — making it harder for any competitor to displace ADORA from these positions, and continuing to expand into adjacent queries. Specifically:

Focus 01

Review velocity

Build the review base to match the visibility. AI platforms are starting to cite review counts. ADORA's authority signals are strong; review volume is the remaining gap to close.

Focus 02

Adjacent queries

Event security, mobile patrol, and HOA patrols are still uncovered. With the foundation now established, expanding into these niches is mechanical — same playbook, new pages.

Focus 03

Geographic expansion

The foundation that works in Conroe will work in Montgomery, The Woodlands, and Magnolia. Each new location page becomes another set of citable signals across all four AI platforms.
